src: Anime figure of a flame-haired swordsman on a plain black metal base with a slender katana, in a dynamic pose with white flame cape and red katana, battle-ready stance.
edit: A feminine warrior wielding a slender katana, in pastel colors and lacquer, dressed in a v-neck top with a skirt and massive belt, barefoot with ankle rings, cloak with flower petals, in battle-ready stance, with shoulder-length neon hair.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, slightly right. Left foot forward, right foot back, both hands holding a raised katana, on a wood-grain tabletop, with a blurred dark vertical support on the rear left and a pale wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, left foot forward, right foot back, hands gripping a katana raised overhead, on a wood-grain tabletop, with a dark support rear left and a pale wall behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, closeup, with her face, body, and katana centered on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: A figure is viewed from an eye-level frontal angle on a dark wooden table with a keyboard and a turned-off computer screen behind.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle from the left, placed on a dark plastic table with a black leather chair on the left and a dark wood office drawer in the top right corner.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The figure is viewed from above front, on a dark wooden table, with a keyboard and a turned-off computer screen behind her.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The figure is seen from a slight overhead angle, left foot forward and right back, holding a shimmering katana overhead. It stands on an enchanted wooden tabletop, with a dark pillar and pale stone wall in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The figure is viewed from a slight overhead angle, left foot forward and right foot back, gripping an enchanted katana raised overhead. It stands on a mystical crystal tabletop with swirling energy patterns, with a dark stone pillar rear left and enchanted pale castle walls in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The figure, seen from a slight overhead angle closeup, has an ethereal face, enchanted cloak, and shimmering katana with glowing runes, surrounded by a misty aura on an enchanted, starry black background reminiscent of a magic castle.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The figure stands on a dark wooden table. Behind is a computer keyboard with glowing runes leading to an ancient screen, in a magic-castle style. Ethereal light casts shadows enhancing the mystical aura.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The figure is observed from an overhead angle on a shadowy stone table. To the left, a velvet chair with runes and patterns. In the top right, a dark wooden chest with carvings, resembling a magical castle's chamber.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The figure is seen from above front on a polished stone table. Behind, runes resembling a keyboard lead to a mystical mirror, floating slightly above, creating a magical castle atmosphere.
